# Dhaatrik Chowdhury — Personal Portfolio & Blog

> Personal website of Dhaatrik Chowdhury, an Entrepreneur and AI Engineer from India. Features a portfolio of projects, pedagogy philosophy, and technical blog posts (called "transmissions"). Site version: v4.0.0.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://dhaatrik.github.io/): Portfolio homepage with project showcases, tech stack, and recent blog posts. Features live blueprint-reveal animations and a unified scroll-reveal system with per-element delay staggering.
- [Personnel](https://dhaatrik.github.io/personnel/): About page with personal background, education, and professional experience.
- [Projects](https://dhaatrik.github.io/projects/): Dedicated projects index page displaying all 12 software engineering case studies with IMPACT.LOG pain-level meter, fuckup teaser logs, and live telemetry state per project.
- [Pedagogy](https://dhaatrik.github.io/pedagogy/): Teaching philosophy, DBS Classes YouTube channel archive, and educational methodology.
- [Transmissions](https://dhaatrik.github.io/transmissions/): Blog index listing all published articles. Features a WAI-ARIA 1.2 combobox search widget (role="combobox", role="listbox", role="option") with multi-term fuzzy matching, #tag shortcut, and keyboard navigation (ArrowUp/Down/Escape/).

## Blog Posts (Transmissions)

- [DeltaV Lab Mission Log: RK4, Web Workers, and the KSP Problem](https://dhaatrik.github.io/transmissions/deltav-lab-mission-log/): Engineering diary on building a browser orbital mechanics simulator — Kerbal Space Program motivation, 50Hz RK4 integration, and Web Worker threading.
- [Vellor Mission Log: Building an Offline OS for Tutors](https://dhaatrik.github.io/transmissions/vellor-power-tutor-log/): Why I built Vellor v4 Power-Tutor — offline-first IndexedDB storage, free tutoring operations, and data privacy for independent educators.
- [Teaching From First Principles: A Mission Log on How I Actually Teach](https://dhaatrik.github.io/transmissions/teaching-from-first-principles/): First-person teaching philosophy — observation before equations, sibling-centric trust, and the axiom that knowledge must be free.
- [Why I Started DBS Classes: The Physics of Curiosity](https://dhaatrik.github.io/transmissions/why-i-started-dbs-classes/): Origin story of the DBS Classes YouTube channel, founded October 31 2022, to combat rote learning with first-principles physics and mathematics education.
- [How I Teach: Bus Wheels, Kitchen Labs, and Open Skies](https://dhaatrik.github.io/transmissions/my-ways-of-teaching/): Mission log on non-traditional teaching — sibling-centric tutoring, kitchen thermodynamics, street-side kinematics, and student psychology.
- [Why I Stopped Uploading: An Honest Audit of Consistency and Flaws](https://dhaatrik.github.io/transmissions/why-i-stopped-youtube-classes/): Post-mortem on the DBS Classes YouTube channel cessation — solo production bottleneck, novelty fade, and motivation vs. systems thinking.
- [Interactive Mission Logs: Orbital Insertion Dynamics](https://dhaatrik.github.io/transmissions/scrollytelling-demo/): Scroll-driven launch telemetry demo — staging, circularization burns, Tsiolkovsky equation, built from KSP intuition and DeltaV Lab engineering.

## Projects

Each project page includes: IMPACT.LOG (1–5 neon pain-level bar with ARIA role="meter"), [ FUCKUP LOG ] teaser, SYS.STATUS telemetry, and mission tags.

- [DeltaV Lab](https://dhaatrik.github.io/projects/deltav-lab/): Real-time orbital mechanics simulation engine.
- [Vellor](https://dhaatrik.github.io/projects/vellor/): Offline-first note-taking application.
- [FuelDrop](https://dhaatrik.github.io/projects/fueldrop/): High-concurrency fuel delivery platform.
- [The Infinite Intelligence](https://dhaatrik.github.io/projects/the-infinite-intelligence/): Multi-agent AI debate system.
- [Instant App Opener](https://dhaatrik.github.io/projects/instant-app-opener/): Electron-based local desktop launcher to bypass browser boot latency.
- [Glassbox](https://dhaatrik.github.io/projects/glassbox/): Minimalist secure VM2-isolated Node.js proxy execution sandbox.
- [FinTrack](https://dhaatrik.github.io/projects/expense-vs-investment-tracker/): Offline-first personal finance tracker visualizing expense-vs-investment ratios.
- [Seamless QR Dining](https://dhaatrik.github.io/projects/seamless-qr-dining/): Real-time restaurant menu, ordering, and admin billing pipeline.
- [Vireo Wellness](https://dhaatrik.github.io/projects/vireo-wellness/): Client-side health tracker built with HTML/CSS and IndexedDB.
- [Bill Express](https://dhaatrik.github.io/projects/bill-express/): Fast local PDF billing invoice generator utilizing client-side print layout.
- [MarkPDF](https://dhaatrik.github.io/projects/free-markdown-to-pdf-converter/): Markdown-to-PDF document compiler featuring KaTeX mathematical rendering.
- [Read Aloud Chrome Extension](https://dhaatrik.github.io/projects/readaloud_chromeextension/): Manifest V3 extension wrapping the Web Speech API for custom text-to-speech.

## Footer Diagnostics (v4.0.0)

The site footer includes a live system diagnostics block:
- CURRENT_STUDY: Current learning topic (hand-updated; v4.0.0: applied thermodynamics for FuelDrop v4 energy calculator)
- LATEST_INSIGHT: Dynamically sourced from the description of the most recently published transmission
- PAGES.INDEXED: Auto-computed from posts + projects + static pages count
- SYS.LOAD: Live CPU core count from navigator.hardwareConcurrency
- SYS.LATENCY: Real page load latency from Performance Navigation Timing API

## Key Entities

- **Dhaatrik Chowdhury**: Founder, author, and developer. Nickname: Dhaatu. Known as "Dhaatu Bhaiyaa" (Big Brother Dhaatu) by students.
- **DBS Classes**: "Dhaatu Bhaiyaa's Classes" — a free YouTube channel for physics and mathematics education. 20 videos published between October 2022 and September 2023.
- **Core Philosophy**: "Education Is Not Free BUT KNOWLEDGE IS FREE" — shared with zero terms and conditions.

## Feeds

- [RSS Feed](https://dhaatrik.github.io/rss.xml)
- [Sitemap](https://dhaatrik.github.io/sitemap-index.xml)

## Agent / coding-agent instructions

This repository ships project-scoped skills for AI coding agents (Grok, Antigravity, Cursor-compatible harnesses). Start with [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/dhaatrik/dhaatrik.github.io/blob/main/AGENTS.md).

| Skill | Scope |
|-------|-------|
| dhaatrik-writing-style | Voice and tone for all user-facing copy |
| dhaatrik-mission-report | Mission Report structure for projects and transmissions |
| dhaatrik-astro-site | Astro 6 architecture, components, tests, deployment |
| dhaatrik-visual-system | Sci-fi mission-control UI and design tokens |
| dhaatrik-seo-legacy | Honest SEO, JSON-LD, OG, sitemap/RSS |

Skills path: `.agents/skills/<name>/SKILL.md`
